ItacPersonItem.Notes: Tommaso Campailla was a member of various Academies namely Arcadia, the Assorditi in Urbino, the Buon Gusto in Palermo and the Ereini in Palermo. See Tommaso Campailla, L`Apocalisse Dell`Apostolo San Paolo, Poema Sacro, Rome, 1738, (British Library Shelfmark: 1487.ff.6.). For a biographical account see Giovanni Trieste e Bovio, Notizie Sotriche Spettanti alla Vita, ed alle Opere del Sig. D. Tommaso Campailla, Venice, Occhi, 1763, (British Library Shelfmark: 247.a.10.), For a short account of Campailla`s correspondence see A. Schiavo-Lena, Lettere Inedite di L.A. Muratori, Francesco De Aguirre e Andrea Lucchesi, Catania, Giannotta 1907, (British Library Shelfmark: 10902.f.15.).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
